Bash(cd H:/qitan && uv pip install pydantic)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8008/analyze -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"company_name\\": \\"某科技有限公司\\"}")
Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8008/analyze" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"company_name\\": \\"测试科技有限公司\\"}" | head -c 500)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8008/analyze -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-raw "{\\"company_name\\":\\"测试科技公司\\"}")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8008/analyze -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"company_name": "测试科技有限公司"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8008/analyze" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "Accept: application/json" \\
  -d "{\\"company_name\\": \\"测试科技有限公司\\"}")
